claims.summary: The 768D-to-8D embedding projection can ghost nuanced emotional differences, so variance and compression evidence should remain visible for near-null or magnitude-loss cases.
The 4D narrative arc can flatten circular, looping, or reactive monologues; split and dynamics diagnostics are needed to expose coarsening risk without changing the live 48D lane.
High-entropy vibrancy and semantic sharpening must not create or rescale narrative-arc or shadow-reserved sensations in dims 40-47.
Changing narrative-arc allocation or using reserved dims for live semantic transport would alter the bridge semantic-lane contract and needs Mike/operator approval before implementation.
